Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Apr-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. YOSEF PERETZ, Esq. of Peretz & Associates (Tel: 415-732-3777) for plaintiff;
Atty. CHANTELLE C. EGAN, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP (Tel: 415-397-2823) for Dentsu America LLC (erroneously named as Dentsu America, Inc.), Dentsu Aegis Network US Holdings, Inc., Amnet Group,
Inc., Carat USA, INC., and Amplifi, Inc. (erroneously named as Amplifius, LLC)

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS DENTSU AMERICA, LLC (erroneously named as DENTSU AMERICA, INC.), AMNET GROUP, INC., CARAT USA, INC., and AMPLIFI, INC. (erroneously named as AMPLIFIUS, LLC)'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

The Court calls the matter. The Court emails its tentative ruling the parties and passes the matter to permit counsel time to review the tentative ruling.

The Court re-calls the matter. Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court issues its order granting the motion to compel arbitration. (See signed order for complete ruling. (302/RBU) *****
